evals.prompt: Help me create full unit tests for backend/src/Controllers/MangaController.cs. Use xUnit + Moq style from backend.Tests and cover success + error paths for all actions, including Search/SortByGenre/MangaOngoing/MangaComplete empty and non-empty branches.
evals.expected_output: Updates backend.Tests/Controllers/MangaControllerTests.cs with compile-ready, behavior-accurate tests and proper assertions for anonymous payloads.

evals.prompt: Please fix backend.Tests/Controllers/MangaControllerTests.cs. The tests currently cast OkObjectResult payload directly to Manga for Create/Update/Delete and use old Manga fields. Update tests to match current controller response and model fields.
evals.expected_output: Refactors existing tests so payload assertions match anonymous response objects and model field usage is current.

evals.prompt: Add focused unit tests for MangaController upload behavior: CreateManga and UpdateManga should call UploadImage once when file is provided and never when file is null. Also verify returned message and data payload shape.
evals.expected_output: Adds or updates tests for both upload and no-upload branches with interaction verification and payload checks.
